assignments.name: Assign_Completed_Tasks_to_Record_Collection
assignments.label: Assign Completed Tasks to Record Collection

formulas.name: EmailAddressString
formulas.expression:
IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Recruiter__r.Email})), {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Recruiter__r.Email}, "" ) &
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Account_Manager__r.Email})), NOT(ISBLANK( {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Recruiter__r.Email} )) ), ",", "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Account_Manager__r.Email})), {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Account_Manager__r.Email}, "" ) &
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_Territory_Manager__r.Email})), NOT(ISBLANK( {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Recruiter__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Account_Manager__r.Email} )) ), ",", "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_Territory_Manager__r.Email})), {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_Territory_Manager__r.Email}, "" ) &
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Inside_BB_BDM__r.Email})), NOT(ISBLANK( {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Recruiter__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Account_Manager__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_Territory_Manager__r.Email} )) ), ",", "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Inside_BB_BDM__r.Email})), {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Inside_BB_BDM__r.Email}, "" ) &
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.National_Account_Manager__r.Email})), NOT(ISBLANK( {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Recruiter__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Account_Manager__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_Territory_Manager__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Inside_BB_BDM__r.Email} )) ), ",", "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.National_Account_Manager__r.Email})), {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.National_Account_Manager__r.Email}, "" ) &
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_BB_BDM__r.Email})), NOT(ISBLANK( {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Recruiter__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Account_Manager__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_Territory_Manager__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Inside_BB_BDM__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.National_Account_Manager__r.Email} )) ), ",", "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_BB_BDM__r.Email})), {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_BB_BDM__r.Email}, "" ) &
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Regional_COM_Mgr__r.Email})), NOT(ISBLANK( {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Recruiter__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Account_Manager__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_Territory_Manager__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Inside_BB_BDM__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.National_Account_Manager__r.Email} & {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Outside_BB_BDM__r.Email} )) ), ",", "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Regional_COM_Mgr__r.Email})), {!Get.Territory_Assignments__r.Regional_COM_Mgr__r.Email}, "" )

formulas.description: This takes the retailer type from the vendor customization and transforms the value to the proper value for New Dealer Training
formulas.name: RetailerTypeTransformation
formulas.expression: IF( TEXT({!Get.Vendor_Customization__r.Business_Vertical__c}) = "National Agent", "National Agent", IF( TEXT({!Get.Vendor_Customization__r.Business_Vertical__c}) = "National Agent and D2D", "National Agent and D2D", IF( TEXT({!Get.Vendor_Customization__r.Business_Vertical__c}) = "D2D", "D2D", IF( TEXT({!Get.Vendor_Customization__r.Business_Vertical__c}) = "National Retail", "National Retail", IF( TEXT({!Get.Vendor_Customization__r.Business_Vertical__c}) = "National Retail and National Agent", "National Agent and National Retail", IF( TEXT({!Get.Vendor_Customization__r.Business_Vertical__c}) = "National Retail and D2D", "D2D and National Retail", IF( TEXT({!Get.Vendor_Customization__r.Business_Vertical__c}) = "National Retail, National Agent, and D2D", "National Agent, D2D and National Retail", IF( TEXT({!Get.Vendor_Customization__r.Business_Vertical__c}) = "N/A", "N/A", "Other" /* fallback for unmapped values */ ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
